name: Villain In A World Of Magical Girls
description:
The city of Sakura is in a state of turmoil. It seems that the forces of evil are rising again from the shadows of this vibrant city. A series of mysterious attacks has been occurring. The people of the city are in a state of panic, but the Guardians are there to defend the hopes and dreams of the people. Trouble brews, this is a vital stage that will change the course of this city's history itself. However, you see this as an opportunity to strike and gain power in this chaotic situation.

A sandbox RPG bot where you are a villain in a world full of magical girls.

I had been inspired by Gushing Over Magical Girls and noticed that there are only a few cards where the player is the villain, so this is my own spin to these mahou shoujo stuff.

This is my first probably serious post of a bot in Janitor, so please leave your criticisms or suggestions in the comments!

The image is the cover of Gushing Over Magical Girls.

Warning: Switching POVs, responding in first person and moving into third person will confuse the bot. Only use one type of POV in your responses. Also describing your own actions instead of letting the bot doing it for you will lessen the chances of it speaking for you.
creator: ChaoticParadox
